description:
Add a new helper function to e2e/harness/lib/setup.sh that runs multiple commands in a single devshell session.

Current pattern (slow - 6 devshell invocations):
  run_in_devshell "cmd1"
  run_in_devshell "cmd2"
  run_in_devshell "cmd3"

New pattern (fast - 1 devshell invocation):
  run_in_devshell_script <<'EOF'
    cmd1
    cmd2
    cmd3
  EOF

The helper should:
- Accept commands via heredoc or string argument
- Run all commands in a single nix develop session
- Properly handle errors (fail on first error)
- Support capturing output for assertions

Expected savings: ~13-15s per avoided devshell call
title: Add run_in_devshell_script helper for batched commands
